prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You've got this! The task might seem daunting, but remember that you have the skills and determination to tackle it. Break it down into smaller steps and focus on taking one at a time. Don't be afraid to ask for help or take breaks when needed. You can do hard things! Now, take a deep breath and dive in. Show this task who's boss, you've got this!
